title: Iran refuses to give in, seeking greater global economic pain
summary_full: Tehran’s unwillingness to capitulate as the war enters its fourth week is wrapped up in the power it exerts over the Strait of Hormuz, officials in the region say.
summary_public: Tehran’s unwillingness to capitulate as the war enters its fourth week is wrapped up in the power it exerts over the Strait of Hormuz, officials in the region say.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran refuses to give in, seeking greater global economic pain
